recommendations.title: Marvel One-Shot: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to Thor's Hammer
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Fantasy, Adventure, Action, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Agent Coulson stops at a convenience store and deals with a coincidental robbery during his visit.

recommendations.title: Extortion
recommendations.overview: A doctor desperately tries to save his wife and their 5 year old son after their vacation in the Bahamas takes an unexpected turn.

recommendations.title: Room
recommendations.overview: Held captive for 7 years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

recommendations.title: Badlapur
recommendations.overview: After his wife and son are killed, a young man finds out the man behind the murder and fights against him, along committing some big mistakes.

recommendations.title: The Hitman's Bodyguard
recommendations.overview: The world’s top bodyguard gets a new client, a hitman who must testify at the International Court of Justice. They must put their differences aside and work together to make it to the trial on time.

recommendations.title: Branded to Kill
recommendations.overview: After botching his latest assignment, a third-ranked Japanese hit man becomes the target of another assassin.

recommendations.title: Blood and Bone
recommendations.overview: In Los Angeles, an ex-con takes the underground fighting world by storm in his quest to fulfill a promise to a dead friend.

recommendations.title: Tiger House
recommendations.overview: A young gymnast battles a group of bank robbers at the home of her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: The Enforcer
recommendations.overview: After years of investigation, Assistant District Attorney Martin Ferguson has managed to build a solid case against an elusive gangster whose top lieutenant is about to testify.

recommendations.title: Black Lotus
recommendations.overview: An ex-special forces operative wages a one man war through the streets of Amsterdam to rescue his friend's daughter from the local crime syndicate.
